case.title: R J REYNOLDS TOBACCO CO. v. ROBERTSON

opinion.h: R J REYNOLDS TOBACCO CO. v. ROBERTSON, 304 U.S. 563 (1938)
R. J. REYNOLDS TOBACCO COMPANY, petitioner, v. C. H. ROBERTSON, Collector of Internal Revenue, etc.* No. 893.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Alexander H. Sands, of Richmond, Va., for petitioner.
For opinions below, see 94 F.2d 167; D.C., 22 F. Supp. 187.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 304 U.S. 589, 58 S. Ct. 1045, 82 L.Ed. --.[ R J Reynolds Tobacco Co v. Robertson 304 U.S. 563 (1938) ]
